subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Such people say that the goal of the prophets has been to claim a position of earthly sovereignty and leadership for themselves
subcodes.first_line_orig: میگویند مقصود انبیا از ادعا ریاست و حکومت بوده با آنکه اساس امر الله ادعای مظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @station of the Manifestation of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
